---
title: "Routes"
format:
  dashboard:
    css: styles.css
    include-after-body: scripts/routes-dashboard.html
---

## Snapshot

### Route Summaries
```{=html}
<div class="route-browser">
<div class="mobile-route-controls">
<div class="mobile-route-control">
<label for="mobile-route-sort">Sort routes</label>
<select id="mobile-route-sort" class="form-select">
<option value="miles_asc">Miles: shortest</option>
<option value="miles_desc">Miles: longest</option>
<option value="elev_asc">Elevation: lowest</option>
<option value="elev_desc">Elevation: highest</option>
<option value="time_asc">Time: shortest</option>
<option value="time_desc">Time: longest</option>
</select>
</div>
<div class="mobile-route-control">
<label for="mobile-route-bart">BART station</label>
<select id="mobile-route-bart" class="form-select">
<option value="">All stations</option>
<option value="San Leandro">San Leandro</option>
<option value="Union City">Union City</option>
<option value="El Cerrito del Norte">El Cerrito del Norte</option>
<option value="Richmond">Richmond</option>
<option value="MacArthur">MacArthur</option>
<option value="North Berkeley">North Berkeley</option>
</select>
</div>
<div class="mobile-route-control">
<fieldset class="mobile-route-radio-control">
<legend>Gravel</legend>
<label><input type="radio" name="mobile-route-gravel" value="include" checked> W/ gravel</label>
<label><input type="radio" name="mobile-route-gravel" value="exclude"> No gravel</label>
</fieldset>
</div>
</div>
<div class="mobile-route-grid" id="mobile-route-grid">
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="North Berkeley" data-miles="11.59" data-elevation="1246.39" data-time="78" data-has-gravel="false">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/spruce-up-euclid-down.html">Spruce up, Euclid Down</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/spruce-up-euclid-down/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>North Berkeley</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>11.59</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>1246.39 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~1:20</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.07 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#91cf60;">83%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="North Berkeley" data-miles="13.91" data-elevation="1747.70" data-time="95" data-has-gravel="false">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/grizzly-peak-loop.html">Grizzly Peak Loop</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>North Berkeley</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>13.91</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>1747.7 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~1:40</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.14 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#1a9850;">85%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="14.16" data-elevation="1716.54" data-time="98" data-has-gravel="false">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/tunnel-to-claremont-loop.html">Tunnel to Claremont Loop</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/tunnel-to-claremont-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>14.16</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>1716.54 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~1:40</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.13 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#d9ef8b;">55%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="14.89" data-elevation="1921.92" data-time="106" data-has-gravel="true">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/arlington-gravel-loop.html">Arlington Loop <span>(<span style="color: chocolate;">28% Gravel</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/arlington-gravel-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>14.89</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>1921.92 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~1:50</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.14 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#91cf60;">83%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="17.41" data-elevation="2444.23" data-time="125" data-has-gravel="false">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/wildwood-bbr-loop.html">Wildwood to BBR Loop</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/wildwood-bbr-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>17.41</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>2444.23 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~2:00</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.31 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#ffffbf;">51%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="18.05" data-elevation="2176.84" data-time="122" data-has-gravel="true">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/wildcat-conlon-nimitz-meadow-loop.html">Conlon Trail Loop <span>(<span style="color: chocolate;">59% Gravel</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/wildcat-conlon-nimitz-meadow-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>18.05</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>2176.84 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~2:00</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.32 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#fee08b;">35%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="18.83" data-elevation="2072.18" data-time="122" data-has-gravel="true">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop.html">Havey Canyon Loop <span>(<span style="color: chocolate;">55% Gravel</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>18.83</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>2072.18 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~2:00</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.30 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#fee08b;">31%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="20.09" data-elevation="3712.93" data-time="153" data-has-gravel="true">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/arlington-to-southpark.html">Arlington into Tilden <span>(<span style="color: chocolate;">45% Gravel</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/arlington-to-southpark/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>20.09</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>3712.93 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~2:30</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.61 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#91cf60;">71%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="San Leandro" data-miles="24.55" data-elevation="2958.33" data-time="167" data-has-gravel="false">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart.html">Redwood Road to Temescal</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>San Leandro</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>24.55</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>2958.33 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~2:50</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.25 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#1a9850;">85%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="Union City" data-miles="25.21" data-elevation="548.88" data-time="135" data-has-gravel="true">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/coyote-union-city.html">Coyote Hills Loop <span>(<span style="color: chocolate;">77% Gravel</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/coyote-union-city/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>Union City</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>25.21</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>548.88 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~2:20</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.07 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#fee08b;">36%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="27.96" data-elevation="3596.13" data-time="197" data-has-gravel="false">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps.html">Tunnel to Pinehurst w/ Shepards Canyon Descent</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>27.96</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>3596.13 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~3:20</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.44 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#d9ef8b;">67%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="Richmond" data-miles="29.66" data-elevation="1466.86" data-time="170" data-has-gravel="false">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/richmond-marin-conzelman-emb.html">Richmond to EMB <span>(<span style="color: forestgreen;">43% Cycleway</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/richmond-marin-conzelman-emb/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>Richmond</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>29.66</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>1466.86 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~2:50</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.07 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#fc8d59;">22%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="32.49" data-elevation="3321.19" data-time="203" data-has-gravel="true">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/three-bears-gravel-loop.html">Three Wild Bears <span>(<span style="color: chocolate;">13% Gravel</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/three-bears-gravel-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>32.49</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>3321.19 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~3:20</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.18 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#1a9850;">89%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="Richmond" data-miles="35.68" data-elevation="1584.32" data-time="201" data-has-gravel="false">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/san-pedro-loop.html">San Pedro Loop <span>(<span style="color: forestgreen;">39% Cycleway</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/san-pedro-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>Richmond</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>35.68</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>1584.32 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~3:20</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.11 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#fee08b;">32%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="San Leandro" data-miles="38.61" data-elevation="5624.67" data-time="271" data-has-gravel="true">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/big-redwood-to-tilden.html">Redwood Road to Tilden <span>(<span style="color: chocolate;">24% Gravel</span>)</span></a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data/routes/big-redwood-to-tilden/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>San Leandro</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>38.61</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>5624.67 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~4:30</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.88 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#91cf60;">76%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
</div>
</div>
```
